narrative:
Chester Township has 1,306 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
